title: Tilray Brands Acquires BrewDog, a Leading Global Craft Brand, Creating a ~$500 Million Global Craft Beer and Beverage Platform
text: Tilray Brands completed its acquisition of BrewDog's core assets on March 2, 2026, paying £33 million for the global brand, UK brewing operations, and eleven brewpubs across the UK and Ireland. The company is separately negotiating to acquire BrewDog assets in the United States and Australia. The acquired assets are expected to generate approximately $200 million in annual net revenue and $6-8 million in adjusted EBITDA during fiscal 2027. The acquisition positions Tilray's total global beverage platform at around $500 million in annual revenue, with Tilray's consolidated business projected to reach approximately $1.2 billion on an annualized basis. CEO Irwin Simon emphasized the focus on returning BrewDog to profitable growth by leveraging Tilray's operational expertise and global infrastructure. The acquisition provides several strategic advantages: Scaled brewing capacity outside the US and established international distribution networks. Access to iconic craft beer brands including Punk IPA, Hazy Jane, and Lost Lager. Eleven strategically located brewpubs providing hospitality and brand presence. The acquisition accelerates Tilray's international expansion strategy by enabling the company to introduce its complementary beverage brands into existing markets while strengthening BrewDog's position in the global craft beer sector.
